turns.content: I'm on Node 20 for all Strata repos right now. Husky and vitest are pinned to versions that target it.
Node 20 is LTS through April 2026, so you've got runway before any forced bump.
Heads up — I bumped Strata to Node 22 last week. The benchmark perf was 12% better on the indexing path, and 22 is the new active LTS now so I figured no reason to wait.
Makes sense. Did the husky hook scripts need any changes for the bump, or did the existing scripts work as-is?

query: What Node version is the user on?
